description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a scattering of white sesame seeds on top. The interior reveals a thick, round beef patty layered with a slice of yellow cheddar cheese, crisp green lettuce, and a slice of red tomato. There are also visible slices of onion and strips of bacon peeking out from the sides, adding texture and color contrast. The cheese is slightly melted, draping over the patty and partially covering the bacon and onions. The lettuce is ruffled and extends beyond the bun, giving the burger a fresh, vibrant appearance. The overall construction is neat, with each ingredient clearly distinguishable and evenly distributed.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with a beef patty, cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomato, onion, and bacon, all neatly layered within a golden bun. The toppings are fresh and visually distinct, with the lettuce and bacon extending beyond the bun.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sesame seed bun, melted cheese, visible bacon strips, onion slices, tomato, and ruffled lettuce extending from the bottom.
description_view_1: This side highlights the cheese and bacon more prominently, with the lettuce and tomato peeking out from beneath the bun.
description_view_2: Cheese and onion are more visible here, with the bacon and lettuce still apparent, and the patty's edge clearly seen.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the bacon strips and lettuce, with the cheese and onion partially visible and the bun's sesame seeds in clear view.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered at the bottom, followed by tomato, a beef patty, melted cheddar cheese, onion slices, and bacon strips, all sandwiched between the top and bottom bun. The toppings are evenly distributed and extend slightly beyond the bun's edge.
